Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CIVIL SERVICE AND PENSIONS

Title: Authorizes the county of Erie to offer an optional twenty year retirement plan to certain deputy sheriffs employed by such county
Summary: Authorizes the county of Erie to offer an optional twenty year retirement plan to Nicholas Cervoni, Thomas Makin, and Sarah Murphy, deputy sheriffs employed by such county.
ActClause: AN ACT to authorize the county of Erie to offer an optional twenty year retirement plan to certain deputy sheriffs employed by such county
